task: Fix Gmail summary not delivered in Slack DM — regex pattern expansion + _wait_and_reply timeout guard

governance_bootstrap.summary: Production changes via git commit/push to origin/main + deploy_to_macmini.sh
Single source of truth is origin/main; direct Mac Mini modification prohibited

root_causes: _GMAIL_SUMMARY_RE regex missed '오늘 나에게 온 메일', '메일 제목', '메일 내용', '어제/최근/금일 이메일' — Gmail fast-path not triggered, fell through to LLM chat path taking >1.2s
_wait_and_reply daemon thread had no timeout — silently hung if agent_run stalled; no completion log so observability was zero

changes.description: Expanded _GMAIL_SUMMARY_RE to 5 patterns covering natural email request phrases
Added future.result(timeout=300) to _wait_and_reply, TimeoutError handler, and completion logger.info

verification.name: gmail regex + live gog test on Mac Mini
verification.command: ssh macmini python3 -c '_try_gmail_summary_response("오늘 나에게 온 메일 정리해줘")'
verification.result: 최근 메일 5건 — Gmail live fetch returned real inbox items, regex matched correctly

verification.name: _wait_and_reply timeout observability
verification.result: 300s guard and completion logger.info confirmed added

deploy.method: git commit + push to origin/main, then scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh
